profile.name: Robert Teran
profile.title: ISO Lead Auditor & Executive Coach
profile.subtitle: Quality is Non-negotiable.
profile.description: I fuse the technical precision of engineering with the development of human talent to create exponential companies.

about.bio: Versatile professional certified as IBM 2025 Coach with over 30 years of industry experience. Solid track record in enterprise quality and environmental management systems, complemented with administrative management, sales, and commercial operations. Certifications as Lead Auditor in ISO 9001, ISO 14001, Lean Manufacturing, and Six Sigma Green Belt. Deep expertise in process optimization, quality management, and continuous improvement. Skills in strategic management, finance, contracts, and IT to integrate departments and lead multidisciplinary projects.

career.description: Over 20 years of experience leading sales and merchandising teams in international retail channels. Development of market strategies, sales training, aligning teams with strategic goals, and interpersonal relationship management.

Leadership in implementing continuous improvement in production processes, Lean Manufacturing methodologies, and Six Sigma. Realization of internal and external audits, and development of quality control policies.

services.title: ISO Lead Auditor
services.description: Specialist in Quality (9001) and Environmental (14001) Management Systems. Over 30 years guaranteeing operational excellence.
services.detailedDescription: As an ISO Lead Auditor, my approach goes beyond simple regulatory compliance. I implement robust management systems that act as the engine for continuous improvement in your organization. My methodology includes a deep Gap Analysis, custom process design, internal team training, and pre-certification audits. I have successfully led over 50 certification processes in industries ranging from manufacturing to technological services, ensuring not just the certificate, but a real transformation in the company's quality culture.

services.title: IBM 2025 Coach
services.detailedDescription: Executive coaching is the bridge between potential and high performance. As a certified IBM 2025 Coach, I use proven frameworks to develop critical leadership skills in executives and middle managers. We focus on decision-making under pressure, organizational change management, assertive communication, and team alignment with strategic goals (OKRs). Each program is customized, combining individual sessions with team dynamics to ensure a systemic and lasting impact on the organization.

certificationsInfo.title: Standards of Excellence
certificationsInfo.description: ISO certifications are the gold standard for lead auditors. The most requested, upon which I base my methodology, include:

certifications.title: ISO 9001:2015
certifications.subtitle: Quality Management
certifications.description: Considered the highest level in the quality management career, allowing for the granting or suspension of company certifications.

certifications.title: ISO 14001:2015
certifications.subtitle: Environmental Management
certifications.description: Focused on compliance with environmental regulations and sustainability.

certifications.title: ISO 45001:2018
certifications.subtitle: Occupational Health and Safety
certifications.description: Key to auditing systems that protect worker integrity.

certifications.title: ISO 27001:2022
certifications.subtitle: Information Security
certifications.description: Vital in the digital age for data protection and cybersecurity.

certifications.title: ISO 22000
certifications.subtitle: Food Safety
certifications.description: Specific to the food industry and its supply chain.

certifications.title: ISO/IEC 42001:2023
certifications.subtitle: Artificial Intelligence
certifications.description: An emerging certification for the ethical and technical management of AI.

certifications.title: CIA
certifications.subtitle: Certified Internal Auditor
certifications.description: The only globally accepted certification for internal auditors, awarded by the IIA (Institute of Internal Auditors).

certifications.title: CISA
certifications.subtitle: Certified Information Systems Auditor
certifications.description: Specialized in the control, assurance, and security of information systems.

certifications.title: CPA
certifications.subtitle: Certified Public Accountant
certifications.description: Fundamental for auditors in the financial and accounting field.

certifications.title: CRMA
certifications.subtitle: Certification in Risk Management Assurance
certifications.description: Focused on corporate risk management and assurance.

expertise.title: Process Structuring and Mapping
expertise.description: We transform operational complexity into efficient, scalable, and measurable systems. We map your company's DNA to guarantee sustained and orderly growth.

areas.title: Organizational Structuring
items: Design of organizational charts and agile structures
Definition of roles, job profiles, and responsibilities
Alignment of strategic goals (OKRs and KPIs)

areas.title: Mapping and Optimization
items: Identification and elimination of bottlenecks (Lean Methodology)

areas.title: Standardization (QMS)
items: Creation of quality manuals and corporate policies

areas.title: Risk Management and Improvement
items: Development of corporate risk and impact matrices
Preventive internal audits and corrective action plans

testimonials.quote: Robert's strategic vision completely transformed our operational structure. We achieved ISO 9001 certification in record time and our efficiency increased by 40%.
testimonials.name: Carlos Mendoza
testimonials.title: CEO, TechLogistics
testimonials.caseStudy: TechLogistics faced scalability issues due to manual processes and lack of standardization. Over 6 months, we implemented a Quality Management System from scratch. We mapped over 40 critical processes, trained 15 area leaders, and achieved ISO 9001:2015 certification with no major non-conformities. The result: a 40% reduction in delivery times and a 25% increase in customer satisfaction.

testimonials.quote: His coaching approach not only improved our processes but empowered our entire executive team. A true leader who inspires tangible results.
testimonials.name: Ana Silva
testimonials.title: Operations Director, GlobalCorp
testimonials.caseStudy: GlobalCorp's executive team suffered from communication silos and lack of strategic alignment. Through a 12-week executive coaching program, we worked on role restructuring, OKR implementation, and improving interdepartmental communication. Key personnel turnover decreased by 30% and the team exceeded its annual revenue goals for the first time in 3 years.

testimonials.quote: The process mapping he implemented allowed us to identify bottlenecks costing thousands of dollars a month. His experience is invaluable.
testimonials.name: Roberto Gómez
testimonials.title: General Manager, Food Industries
testimonials.caseStudy: Food Industries had high waste rates in its main production line. Applying Lean Manufacturing and Six Sigma methodologies, we conducted a detailed As-Is mapping. We identified 3 critical bottlenecks and redesigned the workflow (To-Be). We implemented Statistical Process Control (SPC) resulting in a 60% reduction in raw material waste, saving the company over $150,000 annually.
